message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Request Order Change

actor Buyer
actor Grower
actor Manager
entity System
database db

Grower -> System : Make **Order Change Request**
System -> db : Insert **Order\nChange Request**
System -> Manager : Email **Order\nChange Request**

box "Confirmation process"
Manager -> Buyer : Confirm details of **Order\nChange Request** over email
Buyer -> Manager : Confirm details of **Order\nChange Request** over email
end box

alt All agreed?
Manager -> System : Edit **Order**
System -> db : Update **Order**
System -> db : Update **Order\nChange Request**
System -> Manager : Email details **Order Change**
System -> Grower : Email details **Order Change**

else Not agreed to?
note right of System : Nothing to do here unless we add a\n**Change Request** editing function
end

note right of Manager
1. //Email// could also mean text message,
phone call or face to face
end note

@enduml
```
